things.name: Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock)
things.description: Dramatic 604m cliff edge with vertiginous views over Lysefjord, one of Norway's iconic hikes

things.name: Old Stavanger (Gamle Stavanger)
things.description: Europe's best-preserved wooden house district with 173 whitewashed 18th-century homes

things.name: Norwegian Petroleum Museum
things.description: Fascinating insight into Norway's offshore oil industry on the Stavanger waterfront

things.name: Stavanger Cathedral
things.description: Norway's oldest cathedral, a Romanesque masterpiece dating to around 1125

things.name: Lysefjord Cruise
things.description: Boat tour of the stunning Lyse fjord with views up to Preikestolen and Kjeragbolten

things.name: Stavanger Museum
things.description: Natural history and cultural history museum covering the region from prehistory

things.name: Ledaal Manor
things.description: 18th-century manor house, royal residence and the setting for Alexander Kielland's novels

things.name: Swords in Rock Memorial
things.description: Three giant swords commemorating the 872 Battle of Hafrsfjord planted on the shore

things.name: Utstein Monastery
things.description: Norway's best-preserved medieval monastery on an island in the Rennesoy archipelago

things.name: Kjeragbolten Day Hike
things.description: Epic hike to the legendary boulder wedged in a crevice 984m above the Lysefjord
